12. Reunion with Kaori
*Gasp*!!!!
*Pant*... *pant*... *pant*... *pant*. Ugh...
(I've... returned again)
Ajiro-kun! Are you okay!?
Koyuba-san...?
I-I'm sorry! I know you're dealing with Kofune-san's passing, and I'm just bothering you.
(Koyuba-san and the harbor... She called out to me back then, and I think we exchanged contact info...)
Um... sorry. Honestly, my feelings haven't caught up yet.
It's okay! Please don't worry about it at all.

I'm planning to stay on the island a bit longer.
I'd be happy if we could talk again somewhere.
Well then... I should be going soon. See you, Ajiro-kun!
Thank you for boarding.
(W... wait, wait... Calm down...)
(Didn't I just confidently declare that "it has to be a dream" a moment ago?)
(So then... what is this... This feeling that the exact same thing happened just yesterday--)
(Calm down, calm down... This is what I do at times like this. Look at the big picture and calm down...)

I transferred schools in the middle, so

Yes, that Koyuba! It's really been a long time... Ajiro-kun!
It's already been seven years since I left this island.
Yeah. Come to think of it, we haven't kept in touch at all since then...
...Still, I'm surprised. You've really changed since back then.
Eh, really?
Back then, my impression of you was that you were a much quieter girl, Koyuba-san.
It might sound like an excuse, but that's the reason why I didn't recognize you earlier...
It's like you've become more cheerful...
Really!? I'm happy to hear you say that... hehe.
Oh, right. Since you have a suitcase, are you on your way back from a trip or something?
No, I'm living in Tokyo now.
Oh, really? Same as me...!
Are you visiting home today? Or are you here for something else?
Ah… um…
Actually…
...I see. Kofune-san passed away...
Yeah…
U-Um, I'm sorry for asking such an insensitive question.
Don't worry about it.
You know... back in elementary school, I used to look up to Kofune-san.
She was a completely different type from me... Endlessly cheerful, and strong-willed too.
I secretly used to think... how nice it would be to be like her.
It's a shame. It really is...

…Yeah, thanks.

Shinpei Ajiro-kun... there. Yep, registered.
